seo.title: Contact Us | Free Remodeling Consultation
seo.description: Schedule a free consultation with BuiltWell CT. Serving Fairfield and New Haven County homeowners with no-obligation estimates. Contact us to get started today.

data.headline: Contact BuiltWell CT
data.subheadline: Schedule a free consultation, call us directly, or send us a message. We respond within one business day.

data.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within one business day with next steps. No obligation, no pressure.
data.consent_text: By providing my phone number, I agree that BuiltWell CT may contact me by phone, text, or email about my project, including by automated means. Consent is not a condition of purchase. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out. See our Privacy Policy and Terms.

counties.description: Reach our Fairfield County team for a free consultation. We serve Greenwich, Stamford, Norwalk, Westport, and every town across the county with dedicated local crews.

counties.description: Reach our New Haven County team for a free consultation. Based in Orange, CT, we serve every town across the county with fast response times and local expertise.

data.title: Our Office & Location
data.subtitle: BuiltWell CT is headquartered in Orange, Connecticut, centrally located between Fairfield and New Haven Counties. Visit us by appointment or use the map below for directions.

data.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
data.content: Every project starts with a conversation. Our consultations are free and carry no obligation - we want to understand your project before either of us makes any commitments.

items.title: In-Person Consultation
items.description: We visit your home, walk the space, and discuss your vision. Seeing the actual conditions lets us give you an accurate picture of scope and cost.

items.title: Remote Consultation
items.description: Meet over Google Meet or Zoom. Share photos, talk through ideas, and get a sense of feasibility and timeline before committing to a site visit.

data.title: What to Expect
data.content: 93% of our clients say the consultation alone gave them clarity on their project - even before signing a contract.

items.title: Immediate Response
items.description: During business hours, we respond right away. Off hours, expect to hear back the next business day.

items.title: Schedule
items.description: Your free consultation is booked within days. Choose in-person at your home or a remote video call.

items.title: Estimate
items.description: Detailed written estimate delivered within 3-5 business days of your consultation. No surprises, no hidden fees.

items.title: Decision
items.description: Take the time you need to feel confident. No pressure, no follow-up calls unless you want them.

data.title: Flexible Financing Available
data.content: Get approved in about 60 seconds (through GreenSky, subject to credit approval) and start your project today.
